overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit urban night market. The player moves through a covered street area with food vendors and crowds of pedestrians, transitioning to a more open street with towering futuristic buildings and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered night market walkway with food vendors

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered market area, observing food stalls and pedestrians

entered.detail: wooden food stall with warm yellow lighting and vendor serving customers
large concrete overhead structure covering the walkway
glowing purple holographic advertisement floating above the street
blue illuminated vending machine with digital display
vertical blue neon light strips along building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered cyberpunk night market walkway beneath a concrete overpass. A yellow-roofed food stall dominates the center view with warm lighting, while neon blue lights and a purple holographic billboard illuminate the background. The player walks forward through moderate crowds of pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area between covered market and open street

events.description: bald tattooed pedestrian passes very close to camera on the right side
camera slightly turns left to navigate around dense pedestrian traffic

agents.ego_description: navigating through denser crowd, passing close to various pedestrians including a tattooed man and a woman with green hair

notable_agents.action: bald man with facial tattoos and sleeveless jacket walking past camera from right to left

entered.detail: storefront with bright blue neon lighting and glass windows
red illuminated vending machine with product display

segments.scene_description: Moving through a denser crowd in the transition zone, the player passes close to a bald tattooed man and other pedestrians. The blue neon shopfront becomes prominent on the left while the initial food stall recedes behind. The concrete overpass remains overhead but begins to open up ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open cyberpunk street with tall buildings and neon signage

events.description: exits covered market area into open street with tall buildings visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking down the open street, passing fewer pedestrians and observing the towering neon-lit buildings and street vendors

entered.detail: large vertical red sign with white HIBANA text
towering futuristic skyscrapers with multiple neon signs and illuminated windows
cluster of pink and red neon signs on building facades
small vendor cart with green neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the covered market into an open cyberpunk street lined with towering buildings covered in neon signage. A prominent red HIBANA sign stands on the right, while the street stretches ahead with fewer pedestrians and more expansive views of the futuristic cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered, neon-lit night market into a vast, open futuristic cityscape. It begins beneath a concrete overpass in a covered walkway, moving past a warm, yellow-roofed food stall and purple holographic billboards amidst a moderate crowd. As the camera pushes forward, the environment becomes more congested, passing closely by tattooed pedestrians while the initial stall recedes and a bright blue neon shopfront dominates the left side of the frame. The scene then opens up as the player emerges from under the overpass, shifting from the cramped market into a wide street lined with towering skyscrapers. Finally, the view expands to reveal a sprawling urban landscape defined by massive neon signage, including a prominent red HIBANA sign on the right.
